D2 Vision L4 Analyze Reference

The Cornsweet Edge

slide the cusp height and watch two equal greys split apart — then cover the edge to make them merge again

The two flat regions carry identical luminance. Only the central cusp differs — yet the visual system propagates that edge outward and shades each region whole.

Slide the cusp height: the left region looks lighter, the right darker, though both plateaus are the same grey. Toggle the cover to mask the edge — with the cusp hidden, the two regions snap back to identical.
